---
title: "More data wrangling and visualization"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

> Reshape and combine tables with summarise, joins, and pivots; visualize distributions and layered raw-plus-summary plots.

## Slides
[Make slides full screen](slides.qmd)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```

{{< include exercise_1.qmd >}}

{{< include exercise_2.qmd >}}
